title: Preparation of 4% Paraformaldehyde (PFA) for Fixation
author: Martin Thomas Jahn
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jtwcnpe

steps.title: Prepare PFA Solution
steps.instruction: Use a mask and be careful with PFA. Pour 2 g of paraformaldehyde (PFA) powder in 50 ml phosphate buffered saline (PBS; 130 mM NaCl, 10 mM Na2HPO4/NaH2PO4, pH 7.4). Adjust to the amount actually required.

steps.title: Adjust pH
steps.instruction: Check the pH and adjust to pH 7.0.

steps.title: Heat and Clarify Solution
steps.instruction: Heat to approximately 60° C (must not boil!), until the suspension is clear (approximately 1/2 h). If not clear, add some drops of 1N NaOH.

steps.title: Filter and Cool
steps.instruction: Filter through a 0.2 µm filter and place on ice.
